name: io.github.orenehack/okta-workspace-mcp
description: Guided Okta MCP with explicit Browser Session or OIDC/OAuth authentication, redacted security evidence, identity context, and optional read-only organization tools.

environmentVariables.description: Exact HTTPS origin of your Okta organization, for example https://example.okta.com
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_ORG_URL

environmentVariables.description: Public client ID of the Okta Native OIDC application. Required only for OIDC mode; okta-start requests it through MCP elicitation.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Authorization server ID. Defaults to org, the built-in Okta org authorization server.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_AUTH_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: Exact space-delimited OAuth scopes requested during login. Defaults to openid profile email offline_access; groups and approved read-only okta.* scopes are optional.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_SCOPES

environmentVariables.description: Loopback OAuth callback host. Defaults to localhost; use 127.0.0.1 only when that exact host is registered in Okta.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_OAUTH_CALLBACK_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Loopback OAuth callback port. Defaults to 8749; the matching redirect URI must be registered in Okta.
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_OAUTH_CALLBACK_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Browser Session redacted-proof refresh interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 300000 (five minutes).
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_MCP_BROWSER_PROOF_INTERVAL_MS

environmentVariables.description: Live Browser Session inactivity timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 1800000 (30 minutes).
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_MCP_BROWSER_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Optional configuration and token directory override for managed deployments
environmentVariables.name: OKTA_MCP_CONFIG_DIR
